# Loan IQ Workspace Instructions

- This workspace contains a full-stack hackathon starter for Loan IQ.
- Backend code lives in `backend/app` and uses FastAPI with deterministic scoring stubs.
- Frontend code lives in `frontend/src` and uses React with Vite.
- Keep changes small and explainable; prefer deterministic business logic over hidden magic.
- Preserve the seeded demo cases unless the user asks to remove them.
- Use `docker-compose.yml` for local orchestration when validating the end-to-end flow.
